title: Job Hunt: Mark shortlist targets & run first /apply
notes: Day 1 action block. Mark Pursue?=yes on shortlist.md (recommend Capital.com, Kogan.com, Karbon, SDG Group), then run /apply Capital.com. Also confirm visa/work-rights in preferences.md.

title: Job Hunt: Confirm preferences (visa, comp, dealbreakers)
notes: Fix all [CONFIRM] items in job-search/profile/preferences.md: (1) visa/work-rights status — critical for targeting; (2) confirm comp floor and target; (3) list dealbreakers; (4) industries to avoid.

title: Job Hunt: /apply Kogan.com (Data & ML Engineer)
notes: DONE by batch-apply engine (2026-06-21). Full package in job-search/pipeline/kogan-com--data-ml-engineer/. Run /review-outreach + /review-calendar, then submit.

title: Job Hunt: /apply Karbon (Data Engineer)
notes: Run /apply Karbon — fit 8/10, agentic-AI/LLM edge aligns well with Karbon's AI-powered SaaS. Confirm posting is still live first.

title: Job Hunt: Run /activate-schedules + connect Google Calendar
notes: Run /activate-schedules to turn on daily 7am standup and Sunday 6pm weekly-review. Also connect Google Calendar if not already done (see calendar-sync skill).

title: Quantium Analyst: review drafts & submit application
notes: Review resume-tailored.md + cover-letter.md in job-search/pipeline/quantium--analyst-financial-services/, tweak as needed, then submit on the Quantium/LinkedIn posting. Confirm the real application deadline. After submitting, mark Applied in pipeline.md.

title: Quantium Analyst: send week-1 outreach (recruiter + peer)
notes: After /review-outreach: send connection requests to Ash Reedy-McGann (recruiter) and Melina Mackey (peer). Verify Melina's 'Current' Quantium badge before sending. Messages are drafts in outreach.md — you send manually.

title: Quantium Analyst: ramp R basics + consulting case framing
notes: Two JD gaps to close: (1) R (listed alongside Python/SQL) — do an intro; (2) consulting problem-framing for client-facing analytics. Run /career-coach on this role for a full learning plan + interview prep.

title: Capital.com Data Engineer: review package & submit application
notes: Review resume PDF at job-search/pipeline/capital-com--data-engineer-financial-analytics/Dhruv_Nirmal_Capital-com_Data-Engineer.pdf. Confirm job posting still live at careers.capital.com. Revise via /revise-resume if needed. Then submit. After submitting, update pipeline.md status to Applied.

title: Capital.com Data Engineer: send week-1 outreach (recruiter + manager)
notes: After /review-outreach: find and verify contacts on LinkedIn (Capital.com Melbourne, data/analytics team). Priority 1: recruiter; Priority 2: hiring manager. Messages drafted in outreach.md — you send manually. Verify all contacts are currently at Capital.com before sending.

title: Capital.com Prep: Airflow DAG + PostgreSQL SQL gap-close
notes: Two skill gaps for Capital.com: (1) Airflow — complete Astronomer Docs intro, build a local DAG; (2) PostgreSQL — pgexercises.com: CTEs, window functions, SCD2 UPSERT pattern, EXPLAIN ANALYZE. Budget ~2 hrs total. See analysis.md for full learning plan.

title: Kogan.com Data & ML Engineer: review package & submit application
notes: Review resume PDF at job-search/pipeline/kogan-com--data-ml-engineer/Dhruv_Nirmal_Kogan-com_Data-ML-Engineer.pdf. Confirm job posting still live at careers.kogan.com or jobs.lever.co/kogan. Revise via /revise-resume if needed. Then submit. After submitting, update pipeline.md status to Applied.

title: Kogan.com Data & ML Engineer: send week-1 outreach (recruiter + manager)
notes: After /review-outreach: find and verify contacts on LinkedIn (Kogan.com Melbourne, data/ML/engineering team). Priority 1: recruiter; Priority 2: hiring manager. Potential peer contacts: Victor Wenas, Hayden Briese — verify current employment before messaging. Messages in outreach.md — you send manually.

title: Kogan.com Prep: dbt fundamentals + BigQuery sandbox
notes: Two skill gaps for Kogan.com: (1) dbt — complete dbt fundamentals free course at courses.getdbt.com (~3 hrs); (2) BigQuery — run queries in BigQuery free sandbox at cloud.google.com/bigquery/docs/sandbox (~2 hrs). See analysis.md for full learning plan.
